lastSession.summary: Migrated runtime state to .state/, added Codex skills installer, updated docs

backlog.description: installer/file_ops.py _copy_lib_subdir() does not prune obsolete files from ~/.claude/scripts/lib/ — could leave orphaned modules after future refactors

installer/platform.py still duplicates base platform detection that now also lives in scripts/lib/platform_runtime.py; extract a shared platform-core module or generated contract to prevent installer/runtime drift

shipped.summary: Migrate runtime state from .claude/ to .state/ with legacy fallback
Generate Codex skills from command markdown files with trigger hints and pruning
Seed Claude installer defaults and a global CLAUDE.md template
Restore text-processing facade exports for notification hooks
Align shared commands and prompts with Codex CLI support
Preserve user prompts on reinstall and align Codex install checks
Apply ruff and black formatting across installer, hooks, and runtime modules
Update /think --gpt to use gpt-5-codex and newer model guidance
Modularize hook runtime helpers, add Linux notification support, and harden installer entrypoints
Rewrite statusline in Python, remove jq dependency, fix cross-platform support
Split install.py (944 lines) into installer/ package with 7 focused modules
Unify notification pipeline, add run_powershell/run_quiet subprocess helpers
